items.name: complete_pipeline_orchestrator
items.what_it_does: Runs one local end-to-end generation, optional chordpotion attempt, render attempt, and honest status outputs.

items.name: deterministic_skeleton_generation
items.what_it_does: Generates local deterministic harmony, bass, and lead guide MIDI scaffold.

items.name: chordpotion_transform_planner
items.what_it_does: Builds local-only transform plan and reports blocked status when config is missing.

items.name: chordpotion_audition_flow
items.what_it_does: Scores/chooses preset candidates against intent and records blocked state when no captured output exists.
blockers: No automatic transformed MIDI capture implementation.

items.name: chordpotion_reaper_runner
items.what_it_does: Runs chordpotion render backend in honest plan-only mode unless verified final WAV exists.

items.name: local_reaper_backend
items.what_it_does: Reports availability/missing config, writes truthful render reports, and avoids fake render success claims.
blockers: CLI execution path still planned_not_executed in many scenarios.

items.name: render_plan_builder
items.what_it_does: Builds VST render plan from generated stems.

items.name: assisted_pack_export
items.what_it_does: Creates manual-assisted render packs when local automation is unavailable.

items.name: wav_verification
items.what_it_does: Verifies existence/readability/non-zero audio before claiming rendered WAV.

items.name: selector_training_scripts
items.what_it_does: Trains/evaluates local selector only from locally labeled outcomes.
blockers: Training must not run without explicit labeled data.
Current integration pass keeps training disabled.

items.name: theory_conditioning_profiles
items.what_it_does: Provides theory profile rows used for generation intent context.
blockers: Profile file can be missing in fresh clones.

items.name: texture_context
items.what_it_does: Offers texture context metadata for generation intent selection.

items.name: local_config_files
items.what_it_does: Stores local executable/plugin paths and preferred plugin IDs.

items.name: modified_generated_outputs_in_worktree
items.what_it_does: Legacy/generated artifacts from prior branches and runs.

items.name: new_chordpotion_feature_modules
items.what_it_does: Adds intent schema, scoring, selector, audition parsing, and training schema utilities.

items.name: cloud_activation_workstreams
items.path_or_branch: cursor/cloud-full-activation-v1 and modal smoke tasks in scripts/dev.ps1
items.what_it_does: Cloud-related activation and external execution tasks.
blockers: Current integration pass enforces no cloud calls.
